title: Install and Configure ItPay V3 CLI for Agent Hosts
purpose: Guide the agent or runtime owner through installing and configuring the itpay CLI for different agent hosts.
when_to_use: First-time setup of the itpay CLI.
The agent needs to be configured for a specific host (Codex, Claude Code, etc.).
The buyer wants to use itpay in a new environment.

commands.success_signal: Table of targets (claude-code, codex, terminal, telegram, feishu) with config file paths.

commands.intent: show install instructions for a specific target
commands.success_signal: Step-by-step instructions for Claude Code setup.

commands.intent: show install instructions for Codex / Trae

ITPAY_BACKEND_URL.description: Optional V3 backend override. The CLI defaults to https://app.itpay.ai.

ITPAY_BEARER_TOKEN.description: Bearer token for authenticated operations (orders list, vault, profile). Not needed for anonymous cart/checkout.
ITPAY_BEARER_TOKEN.acquired_from: Sign in via web at /signin, then copy the session token.

ITPAY_CART_SESSION_PATH.description: Custom path for the cart session file. Default: ~/.itpay-v3/cart.json

ITPAY_AGENT_DEVICE_ID.description: Legacy compatibility input. V3 enrolls a signed device identity under ~/.itpay-v3/device; agents should not rotate or invent this value.

ITPAY_AGENT_TYPE.description: Agent runtime type. Set this or pass --agent-type for commerce commands, for example codex-desktop or claude-code-cli.

ITPAY_CURRENCY.description: Default currency for cart operations. Default: CNY

host_requirements.terminal: No special config needed. QR renders as ASCII in terminal or saved as PNG file.
host_requirements.codex: Use --host codex or --host trae. Markdown output with images and links.
host_requirements.claude-code: Use --host claude-code. Markdown format with image references.
host_requirements.telegram: Use --host telegram --target <chat_id>. Output includes openclaw_message payloads.
host_requirements.feishu: Use --host feishu --target <open_id>. Output is Feishu Interactive Card JSON.
host_requirements.lark: Use --host lark --target <open_id>. Same as feishu format.

agent_rules: Use the built-in https://app.itpay.ai production default; override ITPAY_BACKEND_URL only for another deliberate environment.
Install globally with npm install -g @itpay/cli for all hosts.
Identify the real runtime with --agent-type or ITPAY_AGENT_TYPE; do not invent a new type to obtain quota.
Run `itpay install` without arguments to see all supported targets.
Server cart facts persist in backend Postgres. ~/.itpay-v3/cart.json only caches last ids, checkout display token, and explicit local drafts.
